/usr/bin/c++ -g --coverage "CMakeFiles/printguard-inspect.dir/main.cpp.o" -o printguard-inspect  ../../src/common/libprintguard_common.a ../../src/pdf/libprintguard_pdf.a ../../src/common/libprintguard_common.a ../../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libqpdf.so.29.9.0
